sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available in sources

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Customization (Edit Mode)
special_mechanics.description: Players can mix and match missile, double, laser, shield and special power-ups into custom combinations. Some weapons available in pre-defined schemes cannot be used in custom schemes and vice versa.

special_mechanics.name: Vic Viper Scaling
special_mechanics.description: Ship size changes based on damage. Reduce power-up returns player one step closer to original size when hit, providing protection from two hits instead of one.

special_mechanics.name: Stage 4 Pseudo-3D Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Third-person perspective bonus level where player controls Vic Viper avoiding wall collisions with no enemies present. Free-floating power-ups scattered throughout.

tier_notes: Tier 1 qualitative data only. No precise movement physics parameters, gravity values, or sub-pixel system information documented in available sources. Game is a scrolling shmup with ship-based movement rather than traditional platformer physics. SNES version notably suffers from severe slowdown during technically demanding moments.
